context.usage: Full-screen base layer behind cage bars; warm cream tone.

composition: Add 6-10 subtle 1px specks using #C2C3C7; keep total speck pixels under 0.7% of the canvas.

acceptance_criteria: Background is exactly 128x128px and fully opaque.
At least 99% of pixels are #FFF1E8; remaining pixels may be #C2C3C7 only.
No gradients, patterns, or anti-aliasing; all pixels are solid colors.
shared_properties: Asset preserves the front-facing 128x128 cage composition.
Core palette fields stay fixed at primary #1D2B53, background #FFF1E8, and accent #FF004D.
Flat pixel rendering keeps the room calm and readable behind gameplay.
differences: This layer establishes the warm indoor cage backdrop for every scene.
The base remains mostly cream so Echo stays visually dominant.
Static rendering keeps the background quiet during repeated care loops.

reference_images.label: cockatiel_reference_photo
reference_images.purpose: Grounds real cockatiel perch scale and cage context around Echo.

reference_images.label: pico_8_topic_art
reference_images.purpose: Grounds toy-like handheld framing and low-resolution room composition.

reference_images.label: pixel_art_topic_art
reference_images.purpose: Grounds crisp background layering, flat fills, and one-pixel structural lines for the cage scene.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteBundle with a single nearest-neighbor texture.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load through AssetServer in the Loading state and store the handle in a typed resource before gameplay starts.
runtime_notes: Snap transforms to whole pixels before render extraction.
Reuse handles through spawn pools or visibility toggles instead of swapping textures in-place.
Keep interaction or collision tuning separate from the art bundle.
